query:
SELECT p.id, p.nameEn, p.departmentId, d.nameEn as deptName 
FROM programs p 
JOIN departments d ON p.departmentId = d.id 
WHERE p.id = 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 582RunNG3RGjvE7.85f193ee7630 --database DF8hhJErzDeZBFGeijL5fW --execute SELECT p.id, p.nameEn, p.departmentId, d.nameEn as deptName 
FROM programs p 
JOIN departments d ON p.departmentId = d.id 
WHERE p.id = 20;

rows.nameEn: Bachelor of Business Administration in Economics
